landing.heroSubtitle: Leveling, moderation, welcome messages, reaction roles, and 19+ more modules — all from one powerful bot.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything your community needs — moderation, engagement, and utilities in one bot.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join servers already using Hubdustry. Free forever, no credit card required.
landing.whySubtitle: Built for communities that matter. No bloat, no complexity — just powerful modules.
landing.why1Desc: Replace 5+ bots with a single solution
landing.why2Desc: Works out of the box, customize later
landing.showcaseSubtitle: A powerful dashboard to manage every aspect of your Discord server.
landing.showcaseDesc1: Real-time insights into member activity, message trends, and server growth.
landing.showcaseDesc2: XP tracking, leaderboards, and role rewards that keep your community engaged.
landing.showcaseDesc3: Visual automation workflows with drag-and-drop — no coding required.
landing.socialProofSubtitle: Servers that keep their members coming back
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.
landing.pricingFreeDesc: Everything you need to get started

integrations.title: Integrations

flow_builder.title: Flow Builder
flow_builder.desc: Design visual automation workflows with a drag-and-drop node editor.

economy.title: Economy
economy.desc: Virtual currency system with daily rewards, shops, and leaderboards.

starboard.title: Starboard
starboard.desc: Highlight popular messages — when enough people react, it gets pinned to a starboard channel.

giveaway.title: Giveaways
giveaway.desc: Create and manage giveaways with customizable duration, winners, and requirements.

automod.title: AutoMod
automod.desc: Automatically filter spam, slurs, links, and other unwanted content.

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.desc: Let members submit and vote on ideas for your community.

logging.title: Server Logging
logging.desc: Log message edits, deletes, joins, leaves, bans, and more to a designated channel.

counting.title: Counting
counting.desc: A fun counting game where members take turns counting in order.

auto_responder.title: Auto Responder
auto_responder.desc: Automatically reply to messages containing specific words or patterns.

birthday.title: Birthdays
birthday.desc: Track member birthdays and send automated celebration messages.

invite_tracker.title: Invite Tracker
invite_tracker.desc: Track who invited whom and how many members each invite link brought.

scheduled_messages.title: Scheduled Messages
scheduled_messages.desc: Schedule messages to be sent at specific times or on recurring intervals.

anti_raid.title: Anti-Raid
anti_raid.desc: Detect and prevent mass-join raids with automatic lockdown and verification.

tags.title: Tags / FAQ
tags.desc: Create reusable text snippets for frequently asked questions.

verification.title: Verification
verification.desc: Require new members to verify before accessing the server.

polls.title: Polls
polls.desc: Create interactive polls with multiple choices and real-time results.

bump_reminder.title: Bump Reminder
bump_reminder.desc: Remind members to bump your server on listing sites like Disboard.

server_stats.title: Server Stats
server_stats.desc: Display live server statistics in voice channel names.

modmail.title: Modmail
modmail.desc: Private messaging system between members and moderators.

role_menu.title: Role Menu
role_menu.desc: Interactive dropdown menus for members to self-assign roles.

confessions.title: Confessions
confessions.desc: Allow members to submit anonymous messages to a designated channel.

temp_roles.title: Temp Roles
temp_roles.desc: Assign roles that automatically expire after a set duration.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.desc: Get notified when specific keywords are mentioned in the server.

social_alerts.title: Social Alerts
social_alerts.desc: Get notified when creators go live on Twitch, YouTube, or other platforms.

reaction_pins.title: Reaction Pins
reaction_pins.desc: Automatically pin messages when they reach a certain number of reactions.

afk.title: AFK System
afk.desc: Set yourself as AFK and automatically notify people who mention you.

sticky.title: Sticky Messages
sticky.desc: Pin a message to the bottom of a channel — it re-sends after each new message.

reputation.title: Reputation
reputation.desc: Let members give and receive reputation points to recognize helpful contributions.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.desc: Set personal or server-wide reminders that trigger at specific times.

auto_thread.title: Auto-Thread
auto_thread.desc: Automatically create a thread for every new message in selected channels.

media_only.title: Media-Only
media_only.desc: Restrict channels to only allow messages with images, videos, or attachments.

nick_guard.title: Nickname Guard
nick_guard.desc: Automatically filter and reset inappropriate or hoisted nicknames.

anti_link.title: Anti-Link
anti_link.desc: Block Discord invite links and external URLs with configurable whitelists.

server_rules.title: Server Rules
server_rules.desc: Display and manage server rules with an interactive acceptance system.

boost_roles.title: Boost Roles
boost_roles.desc: Automatically assign special roles to server boosters.

auto_slowmode.title: Auto Slowmode
auto_slowmode.desc: Dynamically adjust channel slowmode based on message volume.

dialog.enableDesc: This plugin will be activated for your server. You can configure it after enabling.
dialog.disableDesc: This plugin will be deactivated. Your settings will be saved for later.

logs.title: Server Logs
logs.subtitle: Comprehensive event logging — surpasses Discord's audit log.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Real-time server insights — better than Discord Developer Portal.
analytics.mostUsed: Most used in the last {days} days
analytics.moderationDesc: Total warnings, bans, and kicks on record

audience.accountAgeDesc: Age of accounts joining the server
audience.noAudienceDataDesc: Audience demographics will populate as members join and interact with the server.

embeds.title: Embed Send Analytics
embeds.subtitle: Track how your embeds are being sent across channels.

common.noDataYetDesc: Data will appear after events are collected

overview.noActivityYet: No activity yet. Events appear here once the bot is active.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading the dashboard. Please try again.

notFound.title: Guild not found
notFound.description: This server doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

voicemaster.title: VoiceMaster
voicemaster.subtitle: Auto-create temporary voice channels
voicemaster.step1: Create a voice channel in your server (e.g., "➕ Join to Create")
voicemaster.step2: Select it as a trigger channel below
voicemaster.step3: When users join that channel → bot creates a temp channel and moves them in
voicemaster.step4: When the temp channel is empty → bot auto-deletes it
voicemaster.noSetups: No trigger channels set up yet.

levels.title: Levels & XP
levels.announcePlaceholder: Announce in current channel if empty...
levels.announceHint: Leave empty to announce in the channel where the user leveled up
levels.stackRewards: Stack rewards (keep previous roles when leveling up)
levels.noRewards: No role rewards configured. Add one to reward members for leveling up.
levels.rewardExists: A reward already exists for this level

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.membersTotal: {count, plural, one {# member total} other {# members total}}

economy.title: Economy
economy.subtitle: Configure currency, earnings, and view the leaderboard

fields.economyEnabledDesc: Enable or disable all economy commands for this server
fields.robberyEnabledDesc: Allow users to rob each other

economy.failedToSave: Failed to save. Please try again.

leaderboard.noRankingsDesc: No one has earned any currency yet. Members can get started with /daily or /work.

autoSlowmode.title: Auto Slowmode
autoSlowmode.enableMessage: Enable it from the Plugins page to configure these settings.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.subtitle: Manage members, bans, and server safety

actions.kickDesc: Remove a member — they can rejoin with an invite
actions.banDesc: Permanently ban — cannot rejoin unless unbanned
actions.timeoutDesc: Temporarily mute — no messages or voice
actions.pruneDesc: Remove members who haven't been active

moderation.loadMembers: Click search or press Enter to load members
moderation.modLogChannelDesc: All moderation actions will be logged to this channel.
moderation.logPurgeActionsDesc: Create mod case when messages are purged

settings.failedToLoad: Failed to load settings. Please try again.
settings.dashboardAccessDesc: If no roles are selected, only the Server Owner and users with Administrator permission can access the dashboard.

channels.title: Channel Manager
channels.loginRequired: Please log in to manage channels.
channels.selectChannelDesc: Click on a channel from the tree to view details

translate.subtitle: Help translate Hubdustry into your language and earn XP!
